description: getLatestTeamsConversationReferenceImpl returns the row with the most recent last_activity_at for a (tenant, microsoftUserId).
Reader filters by conversation_type (default 'personal') and ignores groupChat/channel rows for that user.
Reader is tenant-scoped: a reference for the same microsoftUserId under a different tenant is never returned.
Reader returns null (does not throw) when no matching row exists.
resolveTeamsMicrosoftUserId maps a PSA user id to the Microsoft user id and normalizes casing so it matches a stored microsoft_user_id.
resolveTeamsMicrosoftUserId returns null when the PSA user has no Microsoft account link.
sendTeamsTestMessageImpl rejects/denies when the caller lacks the teams settings permission (withAuth gate).
Test message returns skipped reason 'addon_inactive' and records a skipped delivery row when the addon is not active; sendBotActivity is never called.
Test message returns 'integration_inactive' when install_status != 'active'.
Test message returns 'capability_disabled' when personal_bot is not in enabled_capabilities.
Test message returns 'bot_not_configured' (and never requests a Bot Framework token) when isBotConnectorConfigured() is false.
Test message returns 'missing_user_linkage' when the admin has no Microsoft account link.
Test message returns 'missing_conversation_reference' with the actionable hint when no conversation reference exists for the admin.
Happy path: test message calls sendBotActivity with the serviceUrl and conversationId from the stored reference and a test activity payload.
On successful send, a teams_notification_deliveries row is written with status='sent', category='test', destination_type='bot_test', destination_id=microsoft_user_id.
When sendBotActivity throws, the action records a status='failed' row with the error message and returns a failed result.
Two consecutive test sends record two distinct delivery rows (attempt nonce in idempotency_key prevents ON CONFLICT collapse).
All test-message DB writes are tenant-scoped (no cross-tenant row written or read).
runTeamsDiagnostics is permission-gated via withAuth and denies unauthorized callers.
Diagnostics report has the expected step ids/titles in order and each step carries a valid status.
Addon check fails with recommendation when getTeamsAvailability returns addon_required.
Integration check fails when no teams_integrations row exists and warns when present but not active.
Capability check warns and names the missing capability when personal_bot or activity_notifications is absent.
Profile check fails when the selected profile is missing, archived, or lacks client_secret_ref.
Package check fails with no package metadata and warns when base URL is unresolvable.
Bot connector check fails with the TEAMS_BOT_APP_* recommendation when isBotConnectorConfigured() is false.
User-linkage check warns with the link recommendation when the admin has no Microsoft link.
Conversation-reference check warns with the 'message the bot first' recommendation when none exists for the admin.
Recent-delivery check reports the latest success and latest failure and warns when the most recent attempt failed.
Recent-delivery check reads only the current tenant's teams_notification_deliveries rows.
overallStatus = 'fail' when any check fails, 'warn' when none fail but some warn, 'pass' when all pass/skip.
Recommendations are deduplicated across checks.
Fully healthy tenant fixture yields overallStatus='pass' and no recommendations.
Diagnostics panel renders the step list with the correct status badge per step after Run diagnostics resolves.
Recommendations bullet list renders when the report includes recommendations and is hidden when empty.
Send test message button shows a success confirmation on a sent result.
missing_conversation_reference skip renders the 'open the bot and message it first' guidance.
Diagnostics and test-message buttons are disabled when the addon is missing or the integration is not active.
Recent delivery summary (last success / last failure) renders from report data.
All new UI strings resolve through i18n with their defaultValue fallbacks (no raw key leaks).
Skip/fail reason codes each map to a defined i18n key.
runTeamsDiagnostics and sendTeamsTestMessage are importable through the packages/integrations boundary used by TeamsIntegrationSettings.
Built dist of @alga-psa/microsoft-teams exposes the two new exports (smoke import).
